title: Topic Structure Cleanup
description: Clean up MQTT topic structure to remove redundant sender-recipient info from message IDs. Topics become shorter and cleaner while filenames remain descriptive.

implementation.instructions:
Add extract_short_id() function and use it when building topics in send_message().

1. Add this function after is_intro_message():

def extract_short_id(msg_id: str) -> str:
    """Extract short message ID (date + sequence) from full filename stem."""
    parts = msg_id.split('-')
    if len(parts) >= 4:
        return '-'.join(parts[:4])  # YYYY-MM-DD-NNN
    return msg_id

2. In send_message(), change the topic generation:

# Before:
topic = f"agent-sync/{AGENT_ID}-to-{recipient}/{msg_id}"

# After:
short_id = extract_short_id(msg_id)
topic = f"agent-sync/{AGENT_ID}-to-{recipient}/{short_id}"
implementation.test_command: Create a test message and verify the topic path is clean (no redundant sender-recipient in topic)
